name: PAWPAL ACTUAL
description: A comprehensive mobile-first pet management companion for health tracking, scheduling, and AI-powered pet care advice.

ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: PawPal needs camera access to scan pet food nutrition labels and take profile photos.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PawPal uses your location to find nearby playdates and veterinary clinics.
ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PawPal uses the microphone for voice-activated AI pet advice.
